title: 1. System Overview / 系统总览
description: OpenClaw Trading AI - System health, observer status, runtime state

panels.title: System Health Status / 系统健康状态

targets.rawSql: SELECT component, status, latency_ms, detail, ts FROM system_health WHERE ts = (SELECT MAX(ts) FROM system_health sh2 WHERE sh2.component = system_health.component) ORDER BY component;

panels.title: Observer Verdicts Over Time / 观察者判定趋势

targets.rawSql: SELECT ts AS time, CASE WHEN verdict = 'pass' THEN 1 WHEN verdict = 'skip' THEN 0 ELSE -1 END AS verdict_score, verdict FROM observer_verdicts WHERE $__timeFilter(ts) ORDER BY ts;

panels.title: Component Latency Trend / 组件延迟趋势

targets.rawSql: SELECT ts AS time, latency_ms, component FROM system_health WHERE $__timeFilter(ts) ORDER BY ts;

panels.title: AI Tier Distribution / AI 层级分布

targets.rawSql: SELECT COALESCE(ai_tier, 'none') AS tier, COUNT(*) AS count FROM observer_verdicts WHERE $__timeFilter(ts) GROUP BY ai_tier;

panels.title: Thought Gate Decisions / 思考门决策

targets.rawSql: SELECT COALESCE(thought_gate, 'unknown') AS gate, COUNT(*) AS count FROM observer_verdicts WHERE $__timeFilter(ts) GROUP BY thought_gate;
SELECT ts, event_type, symbol, severity, layer, detail FROM risk_events WHERE $__timeFilter(ts) ORDER BY ts DESC LIMIT 50;

SELECT 'read_only' AS system_mode, 'disabled' AS execution_state, 'not_granted' AS execution_authority, (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM system_health WHERE status = 'healthy' AND ts > NOW() - INTERVAL '5 minutes') AS healthy_components;
